'''razhada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanoguanide|cyanoguanide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanoguanide|cyanoguanide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| razhada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræzhædæth|ræzhædæth]] || [[word:ræzhædæj|ræzhædæj]] || [[word:ræzhædæsh|ræzhædæsh]] || [[word:ræzhædæ|ræzhædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:razhazhadath|razhazhadath]] || [[word:razhazhadaj|razhazhadaj]] || [[word:razhazhadash|razhazhadash]] || [[word:razhazhada|razhazhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:razhadath|razhadath]] || [[word:razhadaj|razhadaj]] || [[word:razhadash|razhadash]] || [[word:razhada|razhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:razhafdath|razhafdath]] || [[word:razhafdaj|razhafdaj]] || [[word:razhafdash|razhafdash]] || [[word:razhafdaf|razhafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:razhadatha|razhadatha]] || [[word:razhadaja|razhadaja]] || [[word:razhadasha|razhadasha]] || [[word:razhadaka|razhadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:razhadath|razhadath]] || [[word:razhadaj|razhadaj]] || [[word:razhadash|razhadash]] || [[word:razhada|razhada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:razhadathal|razhadathal]] || [[word:razhadajal|razhadajal]] || [[word:razhadashal|razhadashal]] || [[word:razhadakal|razhadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:razhadathatha|razhadathatha]] || [[word:razhadajaja|razhadajaja]] || [[word:razhadashasha|razhadashasha]] || [[word:razhadaka|razhadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:razhadathan|razhadathan]] || [[word:razhadajan|razhadajan]] || [[word:razhadashan|razhadashan]] || [[word:razhadakan|razhadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:razhadathaoro|razhadathaoro]] || [[word:razhadajaoro|razhadajaoro]] || [[word:razhadashaoro|razhadashaoro]] || [[word:razhadakaoro|razhadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
